com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.barcodedecoder

Interface BarcodeDecoder

  • All Superinterfaces:
    Module

    public interface BarcodeDecoder
extends Module
    Helper class for decoding image data.

    Below shows how to use this module to decode image data:

         // 1. Get barcode decoder.
     BarcodeDecoder barcodeDecoder = (BarcodeDecoder)NSDKModuleManagerImpl.getInstance()
                                            .getModule(ModuleType.BARCODE_DECODER);

     // 2. Set callback to monitor decoding result.
     barcodeDecoder.setDecodingCallback(new DecodingCallback() {
              @Override
             public void onDecodingCallback(int eventCode, final String result) {
                 // Handle the result
             }
     });

     // 3. Start to decode when you got image data.
     try {
         barcodeDecoder.startDecode(imageData, imageWidth, imageHeight);
     } catch(NSDKException e) {
         // Handle the exception.
     }

     // 4. Stop decoding if you need.
     try {
         barcodeDecoder.StopDecode();
     } catch(NSDKException e) {
         // Handle the exception.
     }

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void setDecodingCallback(IDecodingCallback decodingCallback)
      Registers a callback to notify decoding result.
      void startDecode(byte[] imageData, int nWidth, int nHeight)
      Starts to decode.
      void stopDecode()
      Stops decoding.

    • Method Detail

      • setDecodingCallback

        void setDecodingCallback(IDecodingCallback decodingCallback)
                  throws NSDKException
        Registers a callback to notify decoding result.

        This shall be called before starting decoding.

        Parameters:
        decodingCallback - [Required] The callback which is invoked after decoding finished.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • startDecode

        void startDecode(byte[] imageData,
                 int nWidth,
                 int nHeight)
          throws NSDKException
        Starts to decode.

        The result of decoding will be given by the registered callback.

        Parameters:
        imageData - [Required] The image that needs to be decoded.It could be an image captured by camera which's default format is YUV. Maximum resolution: 1280*960.
        nWidth - [Required] The width of the image. Shall be >0.
        nHeight - [Required] The height of the image. Shall be >0.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • stopDecode

        void stopDecode()
         throws NSDKException
        Stops decoding.
        Throws:
        NSDKException
